creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #61)
<<<I use a serial console but others may not.
"usb stop" might stop USB keyboard input>>>>>

you can do it without serial console directly in the glass-console ;-)(HDMI) 
if you want :
the exact one-liner :
usb stop; boot
(then press Enter)

I would be interested if it works for you (because than it will probably work for the geek worm-board as a workaround until we have an idea how to patch in u-boot)
